mxCell.value: SHOPEASE E-COMMERCE PLATFORM — Complete Architecture (Amazon / Flipkart Style)
Black & White Reference · System Design · Production-Grade · Coding Ready
CLIENT LAYER
USER MOBILE APP (iOS / Android) React Native / Flutter ───────────── • Browse products • Search & filter • Add to cart • Place orders • Track delivery • Pay online
WEB APP (Browser) Next.js / React ───────────── • Same flows as mobile • SSR for SEO • PWA support
SELLER DASHBOARD (Web) ───────────── • Manage catalog • View orders • Update inventory • Set prices / offers
DELIVERY APP (Mobile) ───────────── • Receive tasks • GPS location (5s) • Accept / Decline • Mark delivered
ADMIN PANEL (Web) ───────────── • Manage all users • CRUD permissions • Send notices • View analytics
HTTPS + TLS 1.3 REST / GraphQL WebSocket (WS)
API GATEWAY + CDN
CDN (Cloudflare) Static assets · Images JS / CSS Edge Cache
LOAD BALANCER Nginx / AWS ALB Round Robin + Health Check
AUTH MIDDLEWARE JWT Validation Token: 15min expiry Refresh: 30 days
RATE LIMITER Redis Token Bucket 200 req/min per user
API ROUTER Routes to microservices gRPC (sync internal)
WEBSOCKET SERVER Socket.io Real-time push to clients (order status, price alerts)
CIRCUIT BREAKER (Hystrix / Resilience4j) Fail-fast on downstream fail
WAF / DDoS Guard AWS Shield · Cloudflare SQL injection protection
MICROSERVICES LAYER (Docker + Kubernetes — Auto-scaling)
USER / AUTH SERVICE Node.js ───────────── POST /auth/login · /signup bcrypt hash compare · JWT issue OAuth 2.0 (Google/Facebook) Account lock after 3 fails
PRODUCT SERVICE Node.js ───────────── CRUD product catalog Inventory check + reserve Stock reduce on order Category / variant mgmt
SEARCH SERVICE Node.js + Elasticsearch ───────────── Debounce 300ms · Autocomplete Fuzzy match · Geo filter 5km Ranking: relevance+price+rating Redis cache 5min TTL
CART SERVICE Node.js ───────────── Add / remove / update qty Stock availability check Price + GST + delivery calc Redis TTL store (30min)
ORDER SERVICE Node.js / Go ───────────── POST /orders · Validate items Create order (PENDING_PAYMENT) Publish order.placed → Kafka Manage order state machine
PAYMENT SERVICE Java / Spring Boot ───────────── Idempotency key check Call Stripe / Razorpay Retry 3x exponential backoff Publish payment.success/failed
NOTIFICATION SERVICE Node.js ───────────── FCM (Android Push) APNS (iOS Push) Twilio SMS · SendGrid Email Retry 3x → DLQ on fail
DELIVERY SERVICE Go (high throughput) ───────────── Geo-match nearest agent (3km) Push notif (30s accept window) Fallback: next agent if declined Publish agent.assigned event
ANALYTICS SERVICE ───────────── Apache Flink stream processing Compute: GMV, orders/min Sink to BigQuery / Redshift Grafana dashboard
REVIEW SERVICE Node.js ───────────── POST /reviews (verified buyers) Rating aggregation Moderation queue MongoDB backend
⟵ gRPC (sync, internal) / Kafka (async, events) ⟶
KAFKA MESSAGE BUS — Event Streaming Backbone (3 Brokers, Replication=3)
DLQ (Dead Letter)
acks=all · idempotent=true · Schema Registry (Avro) · Kafka Connect (CDC→ES, Sink→S3/BigQuery)
Partitions: order-events=6, payment=3, product=6, delivery=12 · Consumer groups per service (each gets all events)
DATA LAYER (Polyglot Persistence)

POSTGRESQL 15 (Primary RDBMS) ───────────────── Tables: users, orders, payments, products, addresses, sessions ACID · Partitioned by date Replica: 1 primary + 2 secondaries PgBouncer connection pool (200)
MONGODB 7.0 (Document Store) ───────────────── Collections: products, reviews, seller_profiles, categories Flexible schema · Sharded TTL index for temp data
REDIS 7.2 (Cache + Queue) ───────────────── • Session store (JWT blacklist) • Cart cache (TTL 30min) • Rate limit counters • Search cache (TTL 5min) • Pub/Sub for WS fan-out • Failed login counters
ELASTICSEARCH 8.x (Search Index) ───────────────── Index: products, sellers Full-text + geo filter Fuzzy match (edit dist 1-2) Ranking: BM25 + custom score Kafka Connect sink (auto-sync)
INFLUXDB (Time-Series) ───────────────── Delivery agent GPS tracks Order status timestamps Price history Retention: 90 days
BIGQUERY / REDSHIFT (Data Warehouse) ───────────────── Analytics · ML training data Flink → BQ stream sink SQL queries by analysts Dashboard (Grafana / Looker)
S3 / GCS (Object Store) ───────────────── Product images · Receipts Kafka event archives ML model artifacts · Logs
EXTERNAL SERVICES
STRIPE / RAZORPAY Payment Gateway ───────────────── Card / UPI / Wallet Webhook callbacks
GOOGLE MAPS API ETA + Routing ───────────────── Distance Matrix API Directions API · Geocoding
FCM / APNS Push Notifications ───────────────── Firebase Cloud Messaging Apple Push Notif Svc
TWILIO / MSG91 SMS Gateway ───────────────── OTP · Order alerts Delivery confirmation
SENDGRID / SES Email Service ───────────────── Order receipts Promotional emails
PROMETHEUS + GRAFANA Monitoring ───────────────── Kafka consumer lag API latency p99 Error rates · Uptime
ML / REC ENGINE SageMaker / Vertex AI ───────────────── Personalized rankings Fraud detection Demand forecasting
HTTPS REST
WS Push
LOGIN / LOGOUT / AUTH FLOW — User, Admin, JWT, OAuth 2.0
Open App
Splash Screen (Branding / Loading)
First Time Opened?
Onboarding Screens (Feature highlights)
Already Logged In? (valid JWT)
HOME SCREEN (Main Activity)
Login Gateway
ADMIN LOGIN (Role: admin)
USER LOGIN (Role: customer)
SIGNUP (New user)
Enter Email + Password
POST /auth/login (API Gateway)
AUTH SERVICE Validate credentials bcrypt hash compare
USER DB (PostgreSQL)
Generate JWT (15min) + Refresh Token (30d)
Store Session in Redis (Refresh token)
Return JWT to App App stores in Keychain / Keystore
HOME SCREEN ✓
Increment fail counter Redis: failed:{email}++
3 Fails?
Lock Account 15min Send security email
Show Error 'Invalid credentials' Retry login
FORGOT PASSWORD FLOW
User clicks Forgot Password
Send Reset Link to Email (JWT 15min expiry)
User sets new password (bcrypt)
SOCIAL LOGIN (OAuth 2.0)
Click 'Login with Google'
Google OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Flow
Backend exchange code → Fetch Google profile
Auto-register if new Issue JWT → HOME
ADMIN CAPABILITIES
Can CREATE users
Can READ users
Can UPDATE users
Can DELETE users
Manage Products / Sellers
View All Data (DB)
Send Broadcast Notifications
Give/Revoke Permissions
LOGOUT FLOW
User taps Logout
DELETE session from Redis Blacklist JWT in Redis
Clear token from device storage
Redirect to Login Screen
ORDER PLACEMENT FLOW — User → Backend → Seller → Delivery Agent (Swimlane)
USER (Mobile App)
ORDER SERVICE + PAYMENT
KAFKA EVENT BUS
SELLER / WAREHOUSE
DELIVERY AGENT
1. Browse / Search Products
2. Select Product + View Details / Reviews
3. Add Items to Cart (local state → API sync)
4. Checkout: Address + Payment Method
5. Tap PLACE ORDER POST /orders
6. Waiting... (loading state)
7. ✓ Order Confirmed (Push notification)
8. Track Order Status (WebSocket updates)
9. Receive Order ✓ Rate seller + product
ORDER STATE MACHINE
DELIVERED ✓

Receive POST /orders (validate JWT) Validate: • Product available? (check DB / Redis) • Stock sufficient? • Address valid? (Maps geocode) Calculate Total: item subtotal + GST + delivery fee + surge pricing (if flash sale)
Create Order in PostgreSQL Status = PENDING_PAYMENT (with idempotency key) Lock inventory in Redis (TTL 10min)

PAYMENT SERVICE: • Check idempotency key (Redis) • Call Stripe/Razorpay • Retry 3× (1s, 2s, 4s backoff) • On SUCCESS: update DB Publish to Kafka: • order-events → order.placed • payment-events → payment.success
HTTP 201 Created → App { orderId, status, estimatedETA }
order-events topic order.placed
payment-events topic payment.success
inventory-events topic stock.reduced
notifications topic consumer: Notification Svc
delivery-events topic delivery.assigned
Fan-out per event: • Notification CG • Inventory CG • Dispatch CG • Analytics CG
DLQ topic (failed after 3 retries)

Seller Dashboard / WMS receives order notification
Staff: CONFIRM order (60s timeout) OR CANCEL (with reason)

Warehouse picks + packs order Status → PROCESSING (published to Kafka)
CAPACITY LOGIC: max 200 active orders If overloaded → notify admin
Order packed → handoff Status → READY FOR PICKUP Triggers Dispatch Service
DISPATCH SERVICE: geo-match nearest agent (5km) push notif to delivery app Agent ACCEPTS (30s window) → AGENT_ASSIGNED status (fallback: next agent if decline)
Agent navigates to seller GPS updates every 5s → Kafka → Redis → WebSocket → User
Agent collects package Marks PICKED_UP in app Status event → Kafka
Agent navigates to user GPS continues (5s intervals) ETA recalculated on each update Push if ETA delta > 5 min
Marks DELIVERED ✓ order.delivered event → Kafka → notify user + rating prompt
PRODUCT SEARCH FLOW — 'Shoes' Example · Debounce · Cache · Elasticsearch · Ranking
User types 'shoes' in search box
DEBOUNCE Wait 300ms after last keystroke (avoid excess API calls)
AUTOCOMPLETE Redis Sorted Set (Trie) Returns top 5 suggestions instantly (<5ms)
GET /search?q=shoes &lat=19.07&lng=72.87 &radius=50km &category=footwear
API Gateway
SEARCH SERVICE
REDIS CACHE Check: search:{hash} Cache Hit? (TTL 5min)

ELASTICSEARCH ───────────────────── • BM25 full-text on: name, desc, brand, tags • Geo filter: radius 50km • Fuzzy match: edit dist 1-2 • In-stock filter • Boost: rating field (×1.5) • Seller reputation (×1.2) • Freshness boost (new items)
RANKING ENGINE ───────────────────── Score = 0.35 × relevance 0.25 × price_competitiveness 0.20 × avg rating 0.10 × seller_speed 0.10 × availability/stock
Store result in Redis TTL = 5 minutes

RESULTS JSON: [ { name: 'Nike Air Max', price: ₹5999, rating: 4.8, delivery: '2 days', seller: 'Nike Official' }, { name: 'Adidas Ultraboost', price: ₹7999, rating: 4.7, delivery: '1 day' }, { name: 'Puma RS-X', price: ₹4499, rating: 4.3, delivery: '3 days' } ]
Display to User Sorted product list with price + rating + delivery
NO → query ES
YES (cache hit)
PAYMENT PROCESSING — Normal Flow, Failure, Retry, Refund
User taps Place Order
Order Service creates PENDING_PAYMENT record in PostgreSQL
Generate idempotency key = hash(userId+cartId+amount) Store in Redis (24h TTL)
PAYMENT SERVICE
Idempotency key already processed?
Already paid? Return existing result (no double charge)
Update order: Status → PLACED Store payment record
Publish to Kafka: payment-events/payment.success order-events/order.placed
RESULT: Order confirmed ✓ Push notification to user
FAILURE PATH
Payment FAILS (Insufficient funds / Card declined / Timeout)
RETRY QUEUE: Attempt 1 → wait 1s Attempt 2 → wait 2s Attempt 3 → wait 4s (exponential backoff)
All retries failed?
Status → PAYMENT_FAILED Release inventory lock Publish payment.failed Notify User: Push+SMS+Email 'Payment failed. Retry?'
User offered: Retry with same card OR change payment method
REFUND FLOW (if charged then cancelled)
User / Seller cancels after payment success
Stripe Refund API call Publish payment.refunded
Update DB Refund in 5-7 business days
User notified via Push+Email
LIVE DELIVERY TRACKING + ETA + ORDER STATUS + NOTIFICATIONS
LIVE TRACKING PIPELINE (Delivery Agent → Server → User App)
DELIVERY APP GPS chip reads coordinates POST /location every 5 seconds {lat, lng, bearing, orderId, agentId}

LOCATION SERVICE (Go microservice)
Redis WRITE: SET agent:{id}:location {lat,lng,bearing} EX 30 (expires in 30s)
Kafka PUBLISH: delivery-events topic key=agentId (partition per agent)

TRACKING CONSUMER Reads delivery-events Consumer group: tracking-cg
ETA SERVICE → Google Maps API (recalculate every update) → Push if delta > 5min
WEBSOCKET SERVER Socket.io Room: room=orderId Broadcast to all listeners of that order
USER APP Map updates smoothly Interpolation between GPS points ETA shown: '30-45 min'
ORDER STATUS UPDATES (State Machine Notifications)
PLACED (Payment confirmed)
CONFIRMED (Seller accepted)
PROCESSING (Warehouse packing)
READY FOR PICKUP (Packed, waiting agent)
AGENT ASSIGNED (Nearest agent accepted)
PICKED UP (Agent collected order)
DELIVERED ✓ (Agent confirms dropoff)
Push notification to user at EVERY status change
Kafka event published at EVERY status change → Notification Service → Push + SMS + Email
NOTIFICATION DISPATCH SYSTEM
Kafka: notifications topic (any order status change event)
NOTIFICATION SERVICE • Read user preferences (DB) • Apply message template • Select channel(s)
FCM / APNS PUSH NOTIFICATION <1 second delivery
TWILIO SMS 1-5 second delivery Critical alerts
SENDGRID EMAIL Order receipts Promotional
WEBSOCKET In-app badge Real-time
RETRY LOGIC: 3 attempts per channel DLQ if all fail Store history in MongoDB
APACHE KAFKA — Deep Dive Architecture (ShopEase E-Commerce System)
PRODUCERS (Microservices publishing events)
ORDER SERVICE Publishes: order.placed, order.cancelled, order.updated, order.delivered, order.returned
PAYMENT SERVICE Publishes: payment.success, payment.failed, payment.refunded, payment.retrying, payment.captured
PRODUCT SERVICE Publishes: product.created, product.updated, stock.reduced, stock.replenished, price.updated
DELIVERY APP (via Location Svc) Publishes: agent.location (every 5s), agent.status, agent.accepted, agent.delivered, agent.unavailable
USER SERVICE Publishes: user.registered, user.updated, user.deleted, user.login, user.address_added
CART SERVICE Publishes: cart.item_added, cart.item_removed, cart.abandoned (after 24hr inactivity)
PRODUCER CONFIG: acks = all retries = 3 enable.idempotence = true compression.type = snappy batch.size = 16384 bytes linger.ms = 5 max.in.flight.requests = 1
KAFKA CLUSTER — 3 Brokers across 3 Availability Zones (Replication Factor = 3)
ZooKeeper / KRaft Controller ───────────────────────────────── • Cluster metadata management • Leader election for partitions • Broker registration / health • KRaft mode: built-in Raft (Kafka 3.3+)
BROKER 1 — AZ-A (Leader Partitions)
Topic: order-events P0 [LEADER] Offsets: 0,1,2,3... (unbounded) Key: userId (ordered per user) Retention: 7 days
Topic: payment-events P0 [LEADER] Key: orderId (guarantee per-order ordering) Retention: 30 days (compliance)
Topic: agent-location P0 [LEADER] (of 12 partitions) Key: agentId · Retention: 1 hour Very high volume: 100s msg/sec
Topic: analytics-events P0 [LEADER] Compacted log (keep latest per key) Retention: 90 days
Topic: notifications P1 [FOLLOWER] Topic: product-events P2 [FOLLOWER] Topic: delivery-tasks P2 [FOLLOWER]
ISR (In-Sync Replicas): All followers caught up = healthy min.insync.replicas = 2 | acks=all = wait for all ISR Segment size: 1GB · Log: [offset 8B][size 4B][key][value(Avro)]
BROKER 2 — AZ-B (Leader Partitions)
Topic: order-events P1 [LEADER]
Topic: notifications P0 [LEADER] Topic: product-events P0 [LEADER]
Topic: agent-location P4-P7 [LEADER] Key: agentId mod 12 → partition assignment High partition count = parallelism
Topic: delivery-tasks P0 [LEADER] Key: sellerId (delivery per seller ordered) Retention: 3 days
All B1 Leader topics as FOLLOWERS (replicated for fault tolerance)
HIGH WATERMARK (HW): offset of last committed message Consumers only read up to HW — no uncommitted data LEADER EPOCH: prevents split-brain after failover
BROKER 3 — AZ-C (Leader Partitions)
Topic: order-events P2 [LEADER] Topic: payment-events P1 [LEADER]
Topic: analytics-events P1 [LEADER] Topic: agent-location P8-P11 [LEADER]
All other topics as FOLLOWERS Surviving 2 broker failures possible

REPLICATION FLOW: 1. Producer → Leader partition 2. Leader writes to disk 3. Followers fetch via ReplicaFetch 4. Follower ACKs to leader 5. Leader updates HW 6. Leader sends ACK to producer ───────────────────── FAILOVER: If leader fails → KRaft elects new leader from ISR in <30 seconds Unclean election disabled (data safety)
CONSUMER GROUPS (Each group gets ALL events)
CG: notification-group Reads: order-events, payment-events Action: Push/SMS/Email per event At-least-once · commits after send Retry: 3x → DLQ
CG: inventory-group Reads: order-events (order.placed) Action: Deduct stock in PostgreSQL Exactly-once via idempotent writes
CG: dispatch-group Reads: order-events (order.confirmed) Action: geo-match agent, assign task Exactly-once via idempotent writes
CG: tracking-group Reads: agent-location (all 12 partitions) Action: update Redis, push WebSocket Low latency: poll interval 100ms
CG: analytics-group Reads: ALL topics Action: Flink stream processing → BigQuery/Redshift sink Batch: 5 min micro-batch
CG: search-sync-group Reads: product-events Action: sync ES index via Kafka Connect Near real-time: <5s lag
CONSUMER CONFIG: auto.offset.reset = earliest enable.auto.commit = false max.poll.records = 500 session.timeout.ms = 30000 heartbeat.interval.ms = 3000 fetch.min.bytes = 1 fetch.max.wait.ms = 500
SUPPORTING INFRASTRUCTURE
SCHEMA REGISTRY (Avro) ───────────────────────────── All events schema-validated Forward / backward compat Producers register schema v1,v2... Consumers validate on deserialize

KAFKA CONNECT ───────────────────────────── Source: Debezium CDC (PostgreSQL) → Streams every DB change to Kafka Sink: Elasticsearch (product/seller) Sink: S3 (event archive / ML data) Sink: BigQuery (analytics warehouse)

DEAD LETTER QUEUE ───────────────────────────── Failed after 3 consumer retries → published to DLQ.{original-topic} Alerts on-call via PagerDuty Engineer inspects + replays manually DLQ retention: 14 days

MONITORING ───────────────────────────── Prometheus scrapes JMX metrics Grafana dashboards: • Consumer lag per group • Messages in/out per topic • Broker disk / CPU Alert: lag > 10000 → PagerDuty Distributed tracing: Jaeger / OpenTelemetry
QUEUE SYSTEMS — Order Queue, Inventory Queue, Payment Queue, High Concurrency, Delivery Assignment
QUEUE vs PUB/SUB — Key Difference

QUEUE (Point-to-Point) Producer → [M1][M2][M3][M4] → ONE Consumer Each message consumed by ONE worker only Use: Task processing, load balancing work Examples: RabbitMQ, SQS, Celery Ordering: FIFO guaranteed (within partition)

PUB/SUB (Broadcast) Publisher → TOPIC → ALL Subscribers Every subscriber gets every message Use: Event notification, fan-out, decoupling Examples: Kafka Topics, SNS, Redis Pub/Sub Ordering: No global guarantee (per partition)
ORDER PROCESSING QUEUE
Multiple Producers (Web + Mobile + API)
Order Queue [O1][O2][O3][O4][O5] FIFO · Persisted · Durable
Worker 1 Processing O1 ACK → delete
Worker 2 Processing O2 NACK → Retry Max 3 → DLQ
INVENTORY QUEUE (stock.reserved → product-events)
Order Service (after payment success)
inventory.orders Queue [IO1][IO2][IO3] Priority: premium sellers first
Inventory Consumer (Warehouse System) Deducts stock in DB
PAYMENT QUEUE (durable, encrypted, idempotent)
Payment Request + idempotency key
payment.requests Queue Encrypted at rest Durable (disk)
Payment Worker Check idempotency Call Gateway
Payment Gateway Stripe / Razorpay
HIGH CONCURRENCY — 50,000+ Orders/sec (Flash Sale Events)
1000s Users Place Orders Simultaneously
Load Balancer (Round Robin)
Message Queue Buffer (absorbs spike — no drops) Kafka / SQS
Auto-scaling Worker Pool K8s HPA: 5→200 pods
PgBouncer DB Pool (200 conns) Circuit Breaker on
DELIVERY ASSIGNMENT QUEUE (Dispatch Service)
Order CONFIRMED (seller packed)
delivery.tasks Queue
DISPATCH SERVICE Geo-match: agents within 5km Sort by distance + rating
Agent A (nearest) Push notif: 30s timeout
Agent B (fallback) if A declines
AGENT_ASSIGNED ✓ Status event → Kafka
NO→retry next
Flow from Mobile App → Server → Database
MOBILE APP LAYER
Mobile App (iOS / Android)
HTTP Request (REST API / GraphQL) POST /order
HTTP Response (JSON + Status Code) 200 OK / 201 Created
SERVER LAYER
API Gateway (Load Balancer)
Auth Middleware (JWT Validation)
Rate Limiter (Throttle Requests)
Order Service
User Service
Payment Service
Search Service
Redis Cache (Session / Cart / Search)
DATABASE LAYER
PostgreSQL (Orders / Users)
MongoDB (Products / Reviews)
Elasticsearch (Search Index)
InfluxDB (GPS / Tracking)
S3 / GCS (Images / Files)
